{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Trader Lar
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Trader Lar]] is a merchant who provides water, fuel, ammo, guns, parts, tools, and cargo.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You missing water, fuel, ammo, or guns?” I recited. “You need new parts, polished tools, or better Subline reception? Spare cargo you need to turn into standards? Trader Lar’s got you covered!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
